title: Prediction of Pneumoconiosis by Serum and Urinary Biomarkers in Workers Exposed to Asbestos
author: Hsiao-Yu Yang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x8dfrs6

steps.instruction: Download the dataset and store at "C:\r". PLoS One Excel Main Raw Datafile.csv
This protocol requires R-3.5.2 for Windows (32/64 bit) (https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/base/)
library(rattle) # Access the weather dataset and utilities.library(magrittr) # Utilise %>% and %<>% pipeline operators.building
